queries.question: Show guitar models and piano models where Yamaha is the manufacturer.
queries.sql:
SELECT Guitars.model_name
FROM Manufacturers JOIN Guitars ON Manufacturers.id = Guitars.manufacturer_id
WHERE Manufacturers.name = "Yamaha"
UNION
SELECT Pianos.model_name
FROM Manufacturers JOIN Pianos ON Manufacturers.id = Pianos.manufacturer_id
WHERE Manufacturers.name = "Yamaha"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?manufacturers a :Manufacturers .
    ?guitars a :Guitars .
    ?guitars p:hasManufacturers ?manufacturers .
    ?guitars p:model_name ?model_name .
    ?manufacturers p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Yamaha")
    BIND(?model_name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?manufacturers a :Manufacturers .
    ?pianos a :Pianos .
    ?pianos p:hasManufacturers ?manufacturers .
    ?pianos p:model_name ?model_name .
    ?manufacturers p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Yamaha")
    BIND(?model_name AS ?o0)
  }
}
